description_long: This house features a steeply pitched A-frame roof with a green metal finish, giving it a distinctive triangular silhouette. The front facade is clad in horizontal wood siding on the upper levels, contrasted by a white and black lower level with large windows and a brick foundation. The structure includes multiple rectangular windows, some vertically aligned, and a prominent dormer on one side of the roof. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and a continuation of the green metal roof. The house appears to be two stories tall, with a modern yet rustic aesthetic. The entryway is understated, integrated into the lower level with minimal ornamentation.
description: A two-story A-frame house with a green metal roof, wood siding, and large windows on the lower level. The design blends modern and rustic elements with a prominent triangular profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the steep A-frame roof, wood siding, and large windows on the lower level.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the green metal roof and central dormer window.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the triangular profile and minimal window arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear/top view showing the roof extension and additional windows on the lower level.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large lower-level windows and vertical upper windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway integrated into the lower level, with no porch or decorative elements, and a flush door design.
